programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: After crashing and ditching a limo, a suspect bolts into a dense, unforgiving stretch of woods and refuses to surrender. Can K9 Chase bring the standoff to an end? When a man threatens to harm himself, officers turn to a less-lethal option, K9 Milo, to safely bring the volatile situation under control. Meanwhile, K9 Nicky faces a race against time. A missing toddler has vanished somewhere in the v

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: When high-speed chases end in foot pursuits, the K9 takes over where engines can't; on Valentine's Day, K9 Igo shuts down a tense standoff before it explodes; K9 Duder teams up with a fellow K9 unit in a takedown that leaves a suspect nowhere to run; K9 Chase proves his name isn't just for show; and K9 Apollo sniffs out someone buried deep in thick brush within seconds.

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: From tangled brush to pitch-black streets, these K9s sniff out danger with precision; after a tense pursuit, K9 Eddie corners a suspect hiding deep in a ravine; across the country, K9 Streeter makes a heart-stopping leap; K9 Riggs corners a double murder suspect; K9 Diesel kicks off his late-night shift by chasing down a hit-and-run perp.

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: Fresh out of the academy, rookie K9 Carrier gets the call, but can he score his first apprehension?; in a pounding downpour, K9 Flash stays locked on the scent, tracking a suspect who bolted even after being tasered.

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: When officers issue that final K-9 warning, it's the last chance to back down - surrender or face the dog. K-9 Scout collides head-on with an armed suspect who refuses to back down and K-9 Vlad, "The Impaler," squares up with a defiant driver who won't follow commands. In the dead of night, K-9 Edge tracks down and takes down two fleeing suspected thieves and K-9 ZAM methodically tears through a v

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: When fleeing suspects put the public at risk, K9 teams race the clock to shut it down; K9 Haywire rolls in with SWAT, in search of a hit-and-run suspect who vanishes into a residential area; in a tense nighttime manhunt, K9s Ax and Endo step into the line of fire to shield their handlers; K9 Rico pulls double duty when a routine traffic stop erupts into chaos; under a blazing sun, K9 King battles

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: When a suspect panics and runs, the dog smells it instantly; one bad decision leads to a very fast ending.
